sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, values Array(Float64));
INSERT INTO test_array (id, values) VALUES (1, [1, 1, nan, nan, 2, 3, 3, 3]);
SELECT id, arrayCompact(values) AS compacted_values FROM test_array;
UPDATE test_array SET values = arrayCompact([4, 4, 5, 6, 6, 7]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayCompact(values) AS compacted_values FROM test_array HAVING length(compacted_values) > 0;
